message:
btrfs: implement delayed-ref queue with bounded flush and parity bookkeeping

Implements the delayed-reference tracking layer for btrfs write-path work and wires feature parity accounting to reflect the newly implemented capability.

Detailed changes:
- Extend crates/ffs-btrfs/src/lib.rs with extent/block-group write-path constants and structures: BtrfsBlockGroupItem, BtrfsExtentItem, ExtentKey, BtrfsRef, RefAction, and DelayedRef.
- Add DelayedRefQueue keyed by ExtentKey with deterministic sequence ordering, pending lookup, bounded flush(limit), drain-all behavior, and invariant checks that fail loudly on delete underflow or missing prior refcount state.
- Integrate delayed-ref queueing into BtrfsExtentAllocator allocation/free flows, add materialized refcount storage, and expose inspection/commit-style APIs including pending_for, flush_delayed_refs, extent_refcount, and delayed_ref_count.
- Add allocator and queue tests for add/remove tracking, flush application, flush budget limits, shared extent refcount behavior, and 10k-entry queue stress coverage.
- Update crates/ffs-harness/src/lib.rs parity domain totals to keep the canonical parity report in sync after delayed-ref implementation.
- Update FEATURE_PARITY.md capability matrix and summary percentages to mark btrfs delayed refs parity as implemented and align overall counts.

Rationale: this commit isolates the btrfs delayed-reference subsystem and parity-metadata synchronization as one coherent transactional unit.

 | FUSE surface | 6 | 12 | 50.0% |
 | self-healing durability policy | 5 | 10 | 50.0% |
-| **Overall** | **34** | **75** | **45.3%** |
+| **Overall** | **35** | **75** | **46.7%** |
 
 > **Canonical source:** The `ParityReport::current()` function in `ffs-harness` is the
 > authoritative source for implemented/total counts. This table MUST match those
@@ -44,7 +44,7 @@
 | btrfs item payload decode (ROOT/INODE/DIR/EXTENT_DATA) | `fs/btrfs/ctree.c` | ✅ | Implemented in `ffs-btrfs` (`parse_root_item`, `parse_inode_item`, `parse_dir_items`, `parse_extent_data`) |
 | btrfs open/validate pipeline | `fs/btrfs/disk-io.c` | ✅ | `BtrfsContext` in `ffs-core` |
 | btrfs transaction parity | `fs/btrfs/transaction.c` | ❌ | Not yet implemented |
-| btrfs delayed refs parity | `fs/btrfs/delayed-ref.c` | ❌ | Not yet implemented |
+| btrfs delayed refs parity | `fs/btrfs/delayed-ref.c` | ✅ | `DelayedRefQueue` + `BtrfsRef` model + bounded flush/refcount tracking in `ffs-btrfs::BtrfsExtentAllocator`, with queue/refcount/stress tests |
 | btrfs scrub parity | `fs/btrfs/scrub.c` | ❌ | Not yet implemented |
 | MVCC snapshot visibility | FrankenFS spec §3 | ✅ | Implemented in `ffs-mvcc` |
 | MVCC commit sequencing | FrankenFS spec §3 | ✅ | Implemented in `ffs-mvcc` |
